TEST.0.title: Codebusters 2026 Division B Regional Test # 11
TEST.0.customHeader:
Names of participants: (Please print neatly)

 
 
 
School Name:

Check your team:  ◻ Varsity     ◻ JV1     ◻ JV2     ◻ JV3

Warning: Do not open this packet until given permission to do so.

Note: There are useful notes after this page.

CIPHER.540.cipherString: The higher you soar the view is much better, and the giant in you appears. Go forth and conquer your dreams.
CIPHER.540.question: Solve this quote by Ocean R Stark that has been encoded using the Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.540.author: Ocean R Stark

CIPHER.539.cipherString: I put a new freezer next to the refrigerator, now they're just chilling.
CIPHER.539.question: A mysterious QR code on the back of a cereal box leads to this encrypted quote using the Checkerboard Cipher with a polybius key of JOURNALIST. What does it say?
CIPHER.539.author: Unknown

CIPHER.522.cipherString: There is so little time. We need to make every moment count.
CIPHER.522.question: Someone left this coded message in the school lab. You are told it's a quote by Shannon Delany encoded with a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.522.author: Shannon Delany

CIPHER.532.cipherString: Experience converts us to ourselves when books fail us.
CIPHER.532.question: You intercept a mysterious radio signal. Decoding it reveals a quote by A. B. Alcott encrypted as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of PINCH and polybius key of FLAGSHIP. What does it say?
CIPHER.532.author: A. B. Alcott

CIPHER.518.cipherString: Nature is full of genius, full of the divinity so that not a snowflake escapes its fashioning hand.
CIPHER.518.question: Henry David Thoreau was often heard to say the following phrase which has been encoded as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains NOT. What does it say?
CIPHER.518.author: Henry David Thoreau

CIPHER.528.cipherString: The telephone will be used to inform people that a telegram has been sent.
CIPHER.528.question: You found the following carved into the bark of a hollow log. You are told that it's a quote by Alexander Graham Bell encoded as a Porta using a keyword of HERO. What does it say?
CIPHER.528.author: Alexander Graham Bell

CIPHER.520.cipherString: Sé que muchos artistas sienten que son unos impostores; eso forma parte del placer de la creatividad.
CIPHER.520.question: A coded message is discovered inside a fortune cookie. It turns out to be a quote by David Cronenberg in Spanish, encoded using a Xenocrypt Cipher using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains UNOS. What does it say?
CIPHER.520.author: David Cronenberg
CIPHER.520.translation: I know that many artists feel that they are frauds - that's part of the pleasure of creativity.

CIPHER.534.cipherString: If you look at nature closely, you will notice miracles all around you.
CIPHER.534.question: During a field trip, you notice these strange markings on a metal plaque. They represent a quote by Shree Shambav, encoded using an Atbash Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.534.author: Shree Shambav

CIPHER.533.cipherString: When I don't understand, I have an unbearable itch to know why.
CIPHER.533.question: A time-capsule USB drive from 1983 just auto-opened with this Nihilist Substitution-encrypted message by Robert A. Heinlein with a keyword of TRIPLE and polybius key of FACTORIES. What does it say?
CIPHER.533.author: Robert A. Heinlein

CIPHER.527.question: An old robot prototype suddenly prints this encoded text. It's encrypted using a Cryptarithm. What do the values 041956 37241 95841 decode to?

CIPHER.517.cipherString: Neatness and cleanliness is not a function of how rich or poor you are but that of mentality and principle.
CIPHER.517.question: The message below was intercepted from an experimental satellite transmission. It contains a quote by Ikechukwu Izuakor, encoded as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.517.author: Ikechukwu Izuakor

CIPHER.535.cipherString: That which is striking and beautiful is not always good, but that which is good is always beautiful.
CIPHER.535.question: You receive this cryptic message from the future through an online time capsule. It's a quote by Ninon de L'Enclos, written in a Caesar. What does it say?
CIPHER.535.author: Ninon de L'Enclos

CIPHER.525.cipherString: Life is too short. I don't have time to speak slowly.
CIPHER.525.question: A glitchy hologram in the school planetarium displays this Fractionated Morse version of Dev Anand's words. You are told that the quote has THAVET in it corresponding to the encoded text Z Y D R Q I A K, meaning A = ●××; D = ●●●; I = ●–×; K = –×●; Q = ×●●; R = ×●–; Y = ××●; Z = ××–. What does it say?
CIPHER.525.author: Dev Anand

CIPHER.536.question: You find an encoded message in the test tube rack, written on masking tape. It's a quote by Pittacus of Mytilene, written in an Affine with a=9 and b=17. What does it say?
CIPHER.536.author: Pittacus of Mytilene

CIPHER.529.cipherString: We are the masters at the moment and shall be for some considerable time.
CIPHER.529.question: Your robot vacuum just projected this message onto the ceiling. It's a quote by Hartley Shawcross encoded with a Porta using a keyword of VEINS. What does it say?
CIPHER.529.author: Hartley Shawcross

CIPHER.516.cipherString: Nothing in this world compares to the comfort and security of having someone just hold your hand.
CIPHER.516.question: You receive an anonymous text message containing a coded passage. It's said to be a quote by Richelle E. Goodrich, encrypted with an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.516.author: Richelle E. Goodrich

CIPHER.538.cipherString: If your experiment needs a statistician, you need a better experiment.
CIPHER.538.question: While scrolling through an old floppy disk labeled "TOP SECRET", you discovered this quote by Ernest Rutherford hidden as a Checkerboard with a polybius key of SPARKLING. What does it say?
CIPHER.538.author: Ernest Rutherford

CIPHER.519.cipherString: Economists are evaluated on how intelligent they sound, not on a scientific measure of their knowledge of reality.
CIPHER.519.question: You discover a scrap of paper tucked inside an old lab notebook. It contains a quote by Nassim Nicholas Taleb encoded as a Patristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher ends with ALITY. What does it say?
CIPHER.519.author: Nassim Nicholas Taleb

CIPHER.526.question: Someone taped a piece of paper with this sequence onto the back of a trophy from last year's Science Olympiad. It's a quote, written using a Cryptarithm Cipher. What do the values 53708 724061 940428 decode to?

CIPHER.524.cipherString: Beware of the man who won't be bothered with details.
CIPHER.524.question: A mysterious QR code on the back of a cereal box leads to this encrypted quote by William Feather using the Fractionated Morse Cipher. You are told that the quote has EBOTH in it corresponding to the encoded text R S U I W B A, meaning A = ●×●; B = ●●●; I = –––; R = ×●×; S = ×–●; U = ●●×; W = ×–×. What does it say?
CIPHER.524.author: William Feather

CIPHER.537.cipherString: Doubt can only be removed by action.
CIPHER.537.question: Your smart fridge started flashing this cryptic message at 3 a.m. It's by Johann Wolfgang von Goethe encoded in an Affine with a=5 and b=18. What does it say?
CIPHER.537.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

CIPHER.531.cipherString: It's always such a joy that you wake up in the morning and there's work to do.
CIPHER.531.question: An explorer's journal mentions a “hidden truth” encoded below. It turns out to be a quote by Jerome Lawrence, written in a Complete Columnar Cipher. The quote has KTODO somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.531.author: Jerome Lawrence

CIPHER.521.cipherString: It's amazing how stress keeps you trim.
CIPHER.521.question: You receive this cryptic message from the future through an online time capsule. It's a quote by Peter Andre, written in a Baconian. You are told that the cipher text DRUMS EVERY MONTH FUZZY decodes to be SAMA. What does it say?
CIPHER.521.author: Peter Andre

CIPHER.523.cipherString: Do people who bring bikes on the subway realize what bikes do?
CIPHER.523.question: A riddle is discovered taped under a chemistry lab bench. It's a quote, encrypted as a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.523.author: Unknown

CIPHER.530.cipherString: Hopes, wants and wishes, all cast across the night sky with my heart in tow.
CIPHER.530.question: This coded passage was discovered in the margin of a physics exam from years ago. It's a quote by Jay Long, encrypted as a Complete Columnar. The quote has ASTA somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.530.author: Jay Long
